Class JasperHtmlExporterBuilder

java.lang.Object
ch.unibas.medizin.dynamicreports.report.builder.AbstractBuilder<JasperHtmlExporterBuilder, JasperHtmlExporter>
ch.unibas.medizin.dynamicreports.jasper.builder.export.AbstractJasperExporterBuilder<JasperHtmlExporterBuilder, JasperHtmlExporter>
ch.unibas.medizin.dynamicreports.jasper.builder.export.JasperHtmlExporterBuilder
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class JasperHtmlExporterBuilder extends AbstractJasperExporterBuilder<JasperHtmlExporterBuilder, JasperHtmlExporter>

JasperHtmlExporterBuilder class.

Ricardo Mariaca
